title: Second staged candidate full spine idempotency (mock)
problem: Tickets 152–158 prove each rank #2 staged spine step individually. Operators lack a single unit test proving re-running discover→report on the same DB does not duplicate rows across the full rank #2 mock spine (mirror ticket-151 for rank #1).
acceptance_criteria: Unit test runs full rank #2 mock spine (discover through generate-run-report) twice on the same DB and asserts stable row counts.
Per-command re-run idempotency test covers discover, fetch, ingest-staged, extract, link, build, detect, reconcile, and generate-run-report with explicit rank #2 fixtures.
No live LLM or live network in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: Live Ollama or live OpenAlex network.
Dual-candidate combined idempotency on one DB.
rollback_plan: Remove rank #2 idempotency test file; retain ticket-158 run-report spine.
